name: open
description: Open files, directories, and URLs from the command line (macOS)

name: -f
--file
options.description: Read input from stdin and open in TextEdit

name: -R
--reveal
options.description: Reveal in Finder instead of opening

name: -n
--new
options.description: Open a new instance of the application

name: -g
--background
options.description: Do not bring the app to the foreground

name: --stdin
options.description: Read from stdin and pass to application

name: --args
options.description: Pass remaining arguments to the application

args.name: target
args.description: File, directory, or URL to open
